name: Env Guard
description: Prevent API keys from leaking into client-reachable code

then.prompt: An API route file was just saved. Scan it and verify: (1) No env variable starts with NEXT_PUBLIC_, (2) All process.env references are to server-side secrets only, (3) No API key string literals are hardcoded. If any violation is found, fix it immediately and explain what was wrong.
